heading: Emergency Discretionary Fund
label: 300cc–43 Emergency Discretionary Fund
notes: Amendments2007—Subsecs. (e) to (g). redesignated subsecs. (f) and (g) as (e) and (f), respectively, and struck out heading and text of former subsec. (e). Text read as follows: “Not later than February 1 of each fiscal year, the Director of the Office shall submit to the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives, and to the Committee on Labor and Human Resources of the Senate, a report on the identified sets of AIDS activities carried out during the preceding fiscal year with amounts in the Fund. The report shall provide a description of each such set of activities and an explanation of the reasons underlying the use of the Fund for the set.”Pub. L. 109–482

Effective Date of 2007 AmendmentAmendment by applicable only with respect to amounts appropriated for fiscal year 2007 or subsequent fiscal years, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–482section 109 of Pub. L. 109–482section 281 of this title
amendments: Amendments2007—Subsecs. (e) to (g). redesignated subsecs. (f) and (g) as (e) and (f), respectively, and struck out heading and text of former subsec. (e). Text read as follows: “Not later than February 1 of each fiscal year, the Director of the Office shall submit to the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives, and to the Committee on Labor and Human Resources of the Senate, a report on the identified sets of AIDS activities carried out during the preceding fiscal year with amounts in the Fund. The report shall provide a description of each such set of activities and an explanation of the reasons underlying the use of the Fund for the set.”Pub. L. 109–482

Effective Date of 2007 AmendmentAmendment by applicable only with respect to amounts appropriated for fiscal year 2007 or subsequent fiscal years, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–482section 109 of Pub. L. 109–482section 281 of this title

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: There is established a fund consisting of such amounts as may be appropriated under subsection (g). Subject to the provisions of this section, the Director of the Office, after consultation with the advisory council established under , may expend amounts in the Fund for the purpose of conducting and supporting such AIDS activities, including projects of AIDS research, as may be authorized in this chapter for the National Institutes of Health.section 300cc–40b of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Director identifies the particular set of AIDS activities for which such amounts are to be expended;

children.label: B
children.text: the set of activities so identified constitutes either a new project or additional AIDS activities for an existing project;

children.label: C
children.text: the Director of the Office has made a determination that there is a significant need for such set of activities; and

children.label: D
children.text: as of June 30 of the fiscal year preceding the fiscal year in which the determination is made, such need was not provided for in any appropriations Act passed by the House of Representatives to make appropriations for the Departments of Labor, Health and Human Services (including the National Institutes of Health), Education, and related agencies for the fiscal year in which the determination is made.

children.heading: Two-year use of Fund for project involved
children.label: 3 Two-year use of Fund for project involved
children.text: In the case of an identified set of AIDS activities, obligations of amounts in the Fund may not be made for such set of activities after the expiration of the 2-year period beginning on the date on which the initial obligation of such amounts is made for such set.

children.heading: Peer review
children.label: b Peer review
children.text: With respect to an identified set of AIDS activities carried out with amounts in the Fund, this section may not be construed as waiving applicable requirements for peer review.

children.heading: Limitations on use of Fund
children.label: c Limitations on use of Fund

children.heading: Construction of facilities
children.label: 1 Construction of facilities
children.text: Amounts in the Fund may not be used for the construction, renovation, or relocation of facilities, or for the acquisition of land.

children.label: I
children.text: amounts were made available in an appropriations Act for the preceding fiscal year; and

children.label: II
children.text: amounts are not made available in any appropriations Act for the fiscal year involved; or

children.label: ii
children.text: amounts are by law prohibited from being expended.

children.label: B
children.text: A determination under subparagraph (A)(i) of whether amounts have been made available in appropriations Acts for a fiscal year shall be made without regard to whether such Acts make available amounts for the Fund.

children.heading: Investment of Fund amounts
children.label: 3 Investment of Fund amounts
children.text: Amounts in the Fund may not be invested.

children.heading: Applicability of limitation regarding number of employees
children.label: d Applicability of limitation regarding number of employees
children.text: The purposes for which amounts in the Fund may be expended include the employment of individuals necessary to carry out identified sets of AIDS activities approved under subsection (a). Any individual employed under the preceding sentence may not be included in any determination of the number of full-time equivalent employees for the Department of Health and Human Services for the purpose of any limitation on the number of such employees established by law prior to, on, or after .June 10, 1993
The term “Fund” means the fund established in subsection (a).
The term “identified set of AIDS activities” means a particular set of AIDS activities identified under subsection (a)(2)(A).

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 1 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the purpose of providing amounts for the Fund, there is authorized to be appropriated $100,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1994 through 1996.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: 2 Availability
children.text: Amounts appropriated for the Fund are available until expended.
